do_not_copy: Do not copy source visuals, layouts, screenshots, brand marks, sales copy, or deck assets.
observed_move: Compare before and after as an editorial delta, with the business change carrying the slide rather than a spreadsheet of attributes.
why_it_works: The audience understands change faster when the contrast is framed around consequences, not rows. A focused comparison makes the buyer's current pain and future state visible at once.
ppt_translation: Use an editable comparison chart or native split layout with two named states, one highlighted delta, and a short implication line in PowerPoint text.
quality_risk: The slide collapses into a dashboard or report when too many cells, badges, or metrics compete for the same level of attention.
